member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.Client.QueryHandlers.InternalClientQueryHandlers.MessageDeliveryQuery(NTDLS.ReliableMessaging.RmContext,NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.Payload.ServerToClient.CMqMessageDeliveryQuery)
member.summary: The client has received a message from the server which needs to be consumed.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient
member.summary: Connects to a MessageServer then sends/received and processes notifications/queries.

member.name: F:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient._subscriptions
member.summary: Contains the queue name and the handler delegate function for that queue.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.SerializationProvider
member.summary: Provides access to the custom serialization provider, if configured.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.IsConnected
member.summary: Returns true if the client is connected.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.OnConnectedEvent
member.summary: Event used for server-to-client delivery notifications containing raw JSON.

member.name: E:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.OnConnected
member.summary: Event used client connectivity notifications.

member.name: E:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.OnDisconnected
member.summary: Event used client connectivity notifications.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.OnExceptionEvent
member.summary: Delegate used to notify of queue client exceptions.

member.name: E:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.OnException
member.summary: Event used to notify of queue client exceptions.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.#ctor(NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the queue service.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the queue client.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.SetSerializationProvider(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.ICMqSerializationProvider)
member.summary: Sets the custom serialization provider. Can be cleared by passing null or calling ClearCryptographyProvider().

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.ClearSerializationProvider
member.summary: Removes the serialization provider set by a previous call to SetSerializationProvider().

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Connect(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects the client to a queue server.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Connect(System.Net.IPAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects the client to a queue server.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.ConnectBackground(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects the client to a queue server in a background thread.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.ConnectBackground(System.Net.IPAddress,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connects the client to a queue server in a background thread.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Disconnect(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Disconnects the client from the queue server.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.CreateQueueAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to create a queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.CreateQueueAsync(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration)
member.summary: Instructs the server to create a queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.CreateQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to create a queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.CreateQueue(NTDLS.CatMQ.Shared.CMqQueueConfiguration)
member.summary: Instructs the server to create a queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.DeleteQueueAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to delete the queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.DeleteQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to delete the queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.PurgeQueueAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to remove all messages from the queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.PurgeQueue(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to remove all messages from the queue with the given name.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.SubscribeAsync(System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.OnMessageReceived)
member.summary: Instructs the server to notify the client of messages sent to the given queue.
member.param: Queue name to subscribe to.
Delegate function to call for each message.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Subscribe(System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.OnMessageReceived)
member.summary: Instructs the server to notify the client of messages sent to the given queue.
member.param: Queue name to subscribe to.
Delegate function to call for each message.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.SubscribeBufferedAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.TimeSpan,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.OnBatchReceived)
member.summary: Instructs the server to notify the client of messages sent to the given queue. The messages are buffered at the client until the batch size is met or the auto flush interval is reached. Note that buffered subscriptions fo not allow for delivery dispositions to be returned to the server and all delivered messages to this subscription will be considered consumed.
member.param: Queue name to subscribe to.
The number of messages to present to the subscriber event in each batch.
The amount of time to wait before presenting the messages to the subscriber even when the batchSize is not met. (0 = never)
Delegate function to call for each batch.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.SubscribeBuffered(System.String,System.Int32,System.TimeSpan,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.OnBatchReceived)
member.summary: Instructs the server to notify the client of messages sent to the given queue. The messages are buffered at the client until the batch size is met or the auto flush interval is reached. Note that buffered subscriptions fo not allow for delivery dispositions to be returned to the server and all delivered messages to this subscription will be considered consumed.
member.param: Queue name to subscribe to.
The number of messages to present to the subscriber event in each batch.
The amount of time to wait before presenting the messages to the subscriber even when the batchSize is not met. (0 = never)
Delegate function to call for each batch.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.FlushBufferedMessages(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Flush the entire message buffer to the subscribed event.
member.param: Whether or not to continue until the message buffer is empty. We do this because we *typically* allow failure-to-lock to defer the event.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.UnsubscribeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to stop notifying the client of messages sent to the given queue.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Unsubscribe(System.String)
member.summary: Instructs the server to stop notifying the client of messages sent to the given queue.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.EnqueueAsync``1(System.String,``0,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions)
member.summary: Dispatches a message to the queue server to be enqueued in the given queue.
member.typeparam: Type of the payload contained in the message
member.param: Name of the queue in which to place the message into.
Payload message inheriting from ICMqMessage.
Options for message enqueuing.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.EnqueueAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions)
member.summary: Dispatches a pre-serialized message to the queue server to be enqueued in the given queue.
member.param: Name of the queue in which to place the message into.
Fully assembly qualified type of the message type for deserialization.
Json for payload message of type inheriting from ICMqMessage.
Options for message enqueuing.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Enqueue``1(System.String,``0,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions)
member.summary: Dispatches a message to the queue server to be enqueued in the given queue.
member.typeparam: Type of the payload contained in the message
member.param: Name of the queue in which to place the message into.
Payload message inheriting from ICMqMessage.
Options for message enqueuing.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Enqueue(System.String,System.String,System.String,NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions)
member.summary: Dispatches a pre-serialized message to the queue server to be enqueued in the given queue.
member.param: Name of the queue in which to place the message into.
Fully assembly qualified type of the message type for deserialization.
Json for payload message of type inheriting from ICMqMessage.
Options for message enqueuing.

member.name: M:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClient.Dispose
member.summary: Disconnects the client from the queue server. This does not need to be called if Disconnect() is called.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration
member.summary: Queue client configuration parameters.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration.AutoReconnect
member.summary: Whether or not the client should attempt to reconnect when unexpectedly disconnected.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration.QueryTimeout
member.summary: The default amount of time to wait for a query to reply before throwing a timeout exception.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration.InitialReceiveBufferSize
member.summary: The initial size in bytes of the receive buffer. If the buffer ever gets full while receiving data it will be automatically resized up to MaxReceiveBufferSize.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration.MaxReceiveBufferSize
member.summary: The maximum size in bytes of the receive buffer. If the buffer ever gets full while receiving data it will be automatically resized up to MaxReceiveBufferSize.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqClientConfiguration.ReceiveBufferGrowthRate
member.summary: The growth rate of the auto-resizing for the receive buffer.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription
member.summary: Describes a subscription to a queue, this reference is needed to unsubscribe to a single queue subscription.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this subscription.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription.QueueName
member.summary: The name of the queue that this subscription is for.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription.DeliveryEvent
member.summary: Function that is called when a message is received for this subscription.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription.BatchSize
member.summary: For buffered subscriptions, this is the number of messages that the client will attempt to honor.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription.AutoFlushInterval
member.summary: The interval in which the message buffer will be flushed even if the batch size is not met. 0 = never.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqSubscription.BatchDeliveryEvent
member.summary: Function that is called when a buffered batch is received for this subscription.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.OnMessageReceived
member.summary: Delegate used for server-to-client delivery notifications containing raw JSON.
member.returns: Return true to mark the message as consumed by the client.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.OnBatchReceived
member.summary: Delegate used for server-to-client delivery notifications containing raw JSON.

member.name: T:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions
member.summary: Represents options for configuring message enqueueing behavior, such as delivery delay and server confirmation timeouts.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions.DeferDeliveryDuration
member.summary: Amount of time, when if set, which the server will delay delivery of the message to subscribers.

member.name: P:NTDLS.CatMQ.Client.CMqEnqueueOptions.ServerDeliveryTimeout
member.summary: The amount of time to wait on the server for confirmation that it received the message.
